summary: A Go-based CLI tool for running infrastructure and service assertions, featuring Goss migration, monorepo discovery, and a plugin system.
concerns: Heavy reliance on session metadata and changelog automation may indicate AI-generated boilerplate
Broad feature expansion (WebSocket, gRPC, monorepo) in recent commits could lead to scope creep
Plugin directory lacks clear structure or language definition
suggestions: Focus on stabilizing the core assertion runner before adding new protocol support
Document the plugin system to encourage community extensions
Consolidate session metadata and chore commits to reduce repository noise
